svg.title: Ferrowl banner — the full clay-toned owl perched on a steel bus rail beside the wordmark, tagline and spec tags, muted industrial palette
svg.desc: A wide README banner: the complete owl with gauge eyes and a register-grid chest stands on the left gripping a steel rail; to the right are the wordmark ferrowl, a tagline, and tags for tcp/ip, serial/rtu, lua and live registers.
